title: Samsung in talks to take a stake in Mistral AI's Series D

cycle_2026-07-23_night_c2_note: Carried forward from cycle 1's report as a promising, not-yet-verified candidate (dedup-check clean, two leads noted: FT via Techmeme + Sifted). Fresh verifier sub-agent (11 searches/fetches) found the 'talks exist' claim clears the business-claim bar via two genuinely independent sourcing chains (FT's own sourcing + Sifted's own separate confidential source, confirmed by direct fetch of sifted.eu). The €1B/€20B figures trace to FT only -- every other outlet relays FT for these specific numbers, and Reuters explicitly could not verify them independently -- so these stayed single-source and were kept out of the headline/TL;DR per the editor gate (Gate 1: headline must rest on confirmed claims only). Fresh adversarial falsifier independently re-checked Sifted's independence, searched for denials/contradictions (none found), confirmed same-day freshness, and re-searched for independent corroboration of the figures (none found) -- story survived adversarial review unchanged. Style gates: EN pass, TR pass (see run report).
